title: Cristmas Vibes
description: Adds some cristmas vibes with anvil rename items to your world :3
body:
Adds some cristmas vibes with anvil rename items to your world :3

===============================

All the rename items:

 - Candy Canes :3
   -base item: cookie
   -name: "[Color] Candy Cane" (first letter shud be letter for color)
   -colors: red (was here), orange, yellow, green, light blue, cyan, blue,
            purple, magenta, brown, light gray, gray, black
 - red candy cane can also be named just "Candy Cane"
 - Hot Choco
   -base item: honey bottle
   -name: "Hot Choco"
 - Glass of Milk
   -base item: honey bottle
   -name: "Glass Of Milk" or "Glass of Milk"
  - Empty Glass
   -base item: glass bottle
   -name: "Empty Glass"
  - Apple Pie
   -base item: pumpkin pie
   -name: "Apple Pie"
  - Strawberry Pie
   -base item: pumpkin pie
   -name: "Strawberry Pie"
  - Strawberry
   -base item: sweet berries
   -name: "Strawberry"
  - Mince Pie
   -base item: apple
   -name: "Mince Pie"
  - Ham Salad
   -base item: rabbit stew
   -name: "Ham salad"
  - Chocolate Candy
   -base item: golden apple
   -name: "Choco Candy"
  - Enchanted Chocolate Candy
   -base item: enchanted golden apple
   -name: "Enchanted Choco Candy"
  - Chocolate Bar
   -base item: golden carrot
   -name: "Choco Bar"
  - Cristmas Pudding
   -base item: apple
   -name: "Cristmas Pudding"
  - Gingerbread Man
   -base item: bread
   -name: "Gingerbread Man"
  - Brownie
   -base item: bread
   -name: "Brownie"

===============================

!!!TEXTUREPACK UPDATING RARELY AND PWS CONTACT DEV'S TWITTER OR DISCORD IF U NEED DS!!!
